title: 3. Points for Forehead Lines and Frown Lines
text:
Area around the forehead and between the eyes
~ !  ~
74
Facial  Cosmetic Acupuncture
~ !  ~
75
These are four muscles around the eyes
related  to  the  forehead  lines  and  frown
lines. The frontalis contraction folds the skin
of the forehead by elevating the eyebrows,
resulting  in  the  forehead  lines.  This  is  a
typical,  dynamic  horizontal  wrinkle
strongly related to muscle movement.
The other three muscles create dynamic
vertical  wrinkles  between  the  eyes.  The
procerus is located between the eyes and
pulls  the  middle  of  the  forehead  skin
downward.  The  corrugator  supercilii  is
located under the depressor supercilii and
pulls  the  eyebrows  to  the  middle.  The
depressor  supercilii  pulls  the  eyebrows
down.
They pull the skin down and toward the
the  nose  (middle  line).  When  these  three
muscles  contract,  the  vertical  wrinkles
(frown lines) are formed. These vertical lines
are harder to control than horizontal lines
like the forehead lines.
⓵ Frontalis *2
⓶ Procerus *1
⓷ Corrugator Supercilii *2
⓸ Depressor Supercilii *2

MUSCLES RELATED TO
FOREHEAD LINES AND FROWN LINES
Facial  Cosmetic Acupuncture
Forehead lines
When the frontalis is tightened with habitual expression repeatedly, the forehead lines
deepen. To reduce the forehead lines effectively, we should release tightened frontalis muscle
with needles. Needles on site of wrinkles help reduce the forehead lines by increasing
circulation under the skin.
